name: ja_current
reference: 日本点字表記法 2018年版（日本点字委員会）
_note: Japanese kana braille (仮名点字). J0 scope: kana mora -> cells only. Morphological analysis (kanji readings), wakachigaki word-spacing, particle は->ワ / へ->エ, numbers + tsunagi-fu, romaji 外字符, and punctuation arrive in later phases. Numbers reuse the global 数符 (number_sign in resources/numbers.json); latin/greek tables are wired for the later romaji path and unused at J0.
